data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for specific task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding. However, the provided evidence only mentions the task 'watch pre-procedure video' and does not include any evidence for the other required task types. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the requirement, as the evidence does not confirm that all specified task types are implemented or validated.
gaps: No evidence of task types: upload document, purchase item, confirm understanding.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
